title: Basic JavaScript Node.js Basics

title: Advanced JavaScript Node.js Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies Node.js architecture, Core modules (fs, path, os), Reading and writing files in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Node.js Basics
description: The following code has bugs related to Node.js architecture. Find and fix them.
